display.purpose: Hero-scale page titles. Sparingly used; most dashboard pages start at Headline.

headline.purpose: Primary page title. The Header component's title slot.

body.purpose: Default reading size for paragraph copy and form text.

body-small.purpose: Meta rows, helper text, inline timestamps.

label.purpose: Uppercase eyebrows above metric values. The only place uppercase is allowed.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: The only resting shadow in the system. Almost invisible against the dark base; presence registers when removed.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover companion. Adds a faint inner border tint on top of the ambient shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out curve for state transitions, hover lifts, and panel reveals.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Tap-feedback transitions: color shifts on press, link hover colors.

motion.name: duration-default
motion.purpose: Default state transition. Card border resolves, button background lightens.

motion.name: duration-deliberate
motion.purpose: Panel reveal, drawer slide, accordion expand.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a screen. Reserved for one CTA per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.295 0.113 309); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.827 0.119 306.383); color: oklch(0.205 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.827 0.119 306.383); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.402 0.16 309); }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: The workhorse. Most buttons on the dashboard use this variant.
components.css: .ds-btn-default { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.371 0 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-default:hover { background: oklch(0.371 0 0); color: oklch(0.827 0.119 306.383); border-color: oklch(0.439 0 0); } .ds-btn-default:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.827 0.119 306.383); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only. Delete account, cancel subscription, hard discard.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.704 0.191 22.216); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.444 0.177 26); border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: oklch(0.444 0.177 26); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.637 0.237 25.331); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default surface for grouped content. Flat at rest; border resolves on hover.
components.html:
Export your data

You'll get a JSON file with everything Dotabod has stored about your account.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.87 0 0); padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.439 0 0); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.556 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-card__title { font: 500 1.125rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.922 0 0); margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card__body { font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.87 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Single-line text input. AntD default under darkAlgorithm.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; } .ds-input-label { font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.87 0 0); } .ds-input { background: oklch(0.269 0 0); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.371 0 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: oklch(0.439 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.627 0.265 303.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.627 0.265 303.9 / 0.2); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped state indicator. Always border + tinted background + text, never a stripe.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid; font: 500 0.75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.025em; } .ds-chip--success { background: oklch(0.262 0.051 172.552 / 0.4); border-color: oklch(0.432 0.095 166.913); color: oklch(0.871 0.15 154.449); } .ds-chip--info { background: oklch(0.257 0.09 281.288 / 0.4); border-color: oklch(0.398 0.195 277); color: oklch(0.785 0.115 274.713); } .ds-chip--warning { background: oklch(0.279 0.077 45.635 / 0.4); border-color: oklch(0.476 0.114 70); color: oklch(0.879 0.169 91.605); } .ds-chip--error { background: oklch(0.258 0.092 26.042 / 0.4); border-color: oklch(0.444 0.177 26); color: oklch(0.808 0.114 19.571); }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tracked label that sits above a metric value. The system's only legitimate uppercase usage.
components.html:
What's next
Renews May 20

Your subscription continues automatically.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-eyebrow { font: 500 0.75rem/1rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-eyebrow-value { font: 600 1.125rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-eyebrow-hint { font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.708 0 0); margin: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar entry. Default reads quietly; hover deepens; selected sits in surface-hover with primary ink.
components.html: Billing
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.5rem Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.87 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.371 0 0); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.439 0 0); color: oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex: 0 0 auto; color: currentColor; }

narrative.overview: Dotabod's dashboard is the quiet panel a Dota 2 streamer keeps open on a second monitor. The streamer is on camera. The dashboard is not. It earns its place by staying out of the way: dim gray surfaces, plain Inter copy, a single saturated purple that only shows up when something matters. Settings load, take a click, and the streamer is back to the game. The system rejects the StreamElements/Streamlabs lineage, no neon accents, no RGB borders, no dense feature menus advertising themselves. It also rejects corporate-SaaS chrome: no faceless gradients, no glassmorphism, no hero-metric template. The dashboard is a utility, not a stage.
keyCharacteristics: Dark by default, single-theme (AntD darkAlgorithm); no light variant.
Achromatic grays carry 90%+ of the surface; purple appears as signal, not decoration.
Cards rest flat; hover is the only thing that ever lifts.
Sentence case in copy, in labels, in buttons. No SHOUTING TYPOGRAPHY.
Inter only. No display script, no retro mono, no domain-themed faces.

rules.name: The One Purple Rule
rules.body: Twitch Purple appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. If two things on a screen would draw the eye to purple, one of them is wrong. Active rail markers, the primary CTA, and inline links are allowed; everything else uses Ink Secondary or a state tone.

rules.name: The No-Rainbow Rule
rules.body: The animate-border-rgb utility in tailwind.css is reserved for Pro upsell theatrics and the marketing surface. It is forbidden anywhere in the authenticated dashboard.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals come from Tailwind's zero-chroma OKLCH gray ramp. Do not introduce a parallel slate, zinc, stone, or the legacy dark-* ramp from tailwind.css. The latter exists for historical compatibility and must not be extended.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Headings, buttons, and labels are sentence case. Not Title Case, not ALL CAPS, except for the deliberate uppercase Label role (eyebrows above metric blocks) which is the only place uppercase is allowed.

rules.name: The 65-75ch Rule
rules.body: Body copy wraps at 65-75ch. Section subtitles use max-w-3xl as the practical cap.

rules.name: The Single-Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter only. Do not pair with a display serif, mono, or script in the dashboard. The OBS overlay's Radiance face is a separate surface; do not import it here.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never carry a shadow as decoration. If a shadow exists at rest, it exists at the lowest visible value. If a shadow grows, it grows on hover, never on click.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: No backdrop-filter blur, no glow halos, no box-shadow larger than shadow-lg. Glassmorphism is forbidden.

dos: Do keep Twitch Purple to less than or equal to 10% of any screen. Use Ink Secondary for ordinary state and reserve purple for active/CTA/link.
Do use full borders for callouts and state tones (border, not border-left).
Do use sentence case in all labels, buttons, headings, and toasts.
Do keep neutrals on Tailwind's OKLCH gray ramp. The dark-* ramp is legacy; do not extend it.
Do use AntD's components under darkAlgorithm. Override at the themeConfig.ts level, not by overriding AntD class names in CSS.
Do keep cards flat at rest. Reveal depth on hover with the existing transparent-to-hairline-hover border transition.
Do describe consequences in plain voice for destructive actions ('This permanently deletes your match history. You can't undo this.').
Do match copy to PRODUCT.md's voice: helpful, technical, no-fluff.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent). Use a full border with the state tone.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient). The dashboard has one solid accent.
Don't use the animate-border-rgb utility on any authenticated dashboard surface. It belongs to marketing/upsell only.
Don't apply glassmorphism, no backdrop-filter: blur, no glass cards. Cards are opaque on surface-base.
Don't import the Radiance or RadianceM fonts into the dashboard. They are reserved for the OBS overlay's Dota UI.
Don't use the hero-metric template (giant number, small label, gradient accent). It is the SaaS cliche PRODUCT.md explicitly rejects.
Don't build identical card grids of icon + heading + text. Vary the surface by what it actually needs to communicate.
Don't use modals where an inline disclosure would do. The only modals in the dashboard are destructive confirms; everything else should be inline or progressive.
Don't use ALL CAPS outside the Label role. SHOUTING TYPOGRAPHY is forbidden in headings, buttons, and toasts.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't copy the StreamElements/Streamlabs aesthetic. No neon, no RGB everything, no ad-stuffed sidebars, no dense feature menus advertising themselves.
Don't mirror corporate-SaaS chrome either, no faceless gradients, no Salesforce-grade density, no formal jargon in errors.
Don't introduce a parallel color ramp (slate/zinc/stone, or a custom new ramp). One ramp. One accent. One state set.
